title: Resource APIs, Pagination, Idempotency, and Concurrency Control · Go Build Room
summary: A server pairing session predicts request, handler, dependency, response, and cleanup transitions before building the first stable resource and mutation consistency contract for resource apis, pagination, idempotency, and concurrency control. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of stable resource and mutation consistency contract while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Define stable transport schemas, domain models, persistence records, optional and null semantics, field ownership, and evolution boundaries separately.
Build opaque cursor pagination from a unique stable order, bound page size, preserve filters and authorization, and test inserts and deletes between pages.
Scope and validate idempotency keys, bind request fingerprints, serialize first execution, persist terminal outcome, expire records, and reject mismatched replay.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Resource Schema Boundary
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop team handles case 3385 in a partner API with an outdated generated client. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate optimistic version conflicts from valid idempotency replay; then saturate one admission budget while another tenant remains serviceable. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define stable transport schemas, domain models, persistence records, optional and null semantics, field ownership, and evolution boundaries separately.
